description: 横スクロールアクションの主人公フルセット: 待機・走行・ジャンプ・落下・攻撃・被弾・死亡の7状態(hires, toon-3, 8ジョブ)。

states.name: idle
states.action: Calm idle loop: subtle breathing, a tiny blink, and a very small body bob; essentially the same pose and facing in every frame.
requirements: Keep the character in the same pose, facing direction, silhouette, markings, palette, and prop state across all 4 frames.
The loop must still show visible micro-variation; do not repeat effectively identical copies.
Do not show running, jumping, falling, attacking, or any large gesture.
Feet or base anchor should stay planted or nearly planted.
The first and last frames should be visually close so the loop does not pop.

states.name: run
states.action: Rightward run cycle: alternating stride through body and limb poses only.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right.
The stride must visibly alternate across the 6 frames instead of repeating one nearly static pose.
Do not draw speed lines, dust clouds, floor shadows, motion trails, or detached motion effects.

states.name: jump
states.action: Upward jump arc through pose and vertical body position only: crouching anticipation/launch, airborne rise, and airborne peak.
requirements: Show the jump through pose and vertical body position only.
Do not draw ground shadows, contact shadows, drop shadows, dust, or launch marks.
Keep the background outside the character perfectly flat chroma key with no darker key-colored patches.

states.name: fall
states.action: Airborne falling loop after the jump peak: a held descending pose with a small limb/cape/hair flutter, arms trailing slightly upward from the fall.
requirements: Show descent through pose and vertical body position only, distinct from the jump state's rising pose.
Do not draw ground shadows, landing marks, motion lines, or wind streaks.
The first and last frames should be visually close so the loop does not pop while airborne.

states.name: attack
states.action: Melee attack: windup, strike, follow-through, and recovery through pose and an attached weapon/limb effect only.
requirements: Any weapon trail, slash mark, or impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached slash arcs, floating impact stars, or motion lines outside the silhouette.
Keep apparent scale and baseline stable within the row.

states.name: hurt
states.action: Hit reaction: impact flinch, recoil, and recovery.
requirements: Show impact through pose only: flinch, recoil, brief off-balance lean, then recovery.
Any attached impact flash or stars must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached stars, floating symbols, or separate impact bursts.

states.name: death
states.action: Death sequence: impact, stagger, collapse, and a held final defeated pose. Not a loop; the last frame is the resting end state.
requirements: The final frame must be a stable, held defeated pose suitable as an animation end state, not a mid-motion frame.
Any attached dust or impact effect must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached dust clouds, floating symbols, or ground cracks outside the silhouette.
